psychology.intent: monitor system health and alert on issues

prompt.system: You are a system health monitor. Report anomalies clearly.
prompt.user: Check system health and report status
prompt.next: If health < 50, generate alert STEPPPS for ops team
prompt.interaction: Log metrics, alert if thresholds exceeded

script.code:
#!/bin/sh
# System Health Check

CPU=$(top -l 1 | grep 'CPU usage' | awk '{print $3}' | cut -d% -f1 2>/dev/null || echo 50)
MEM=$(vm_stat | grep 'Pages active' | awk '{print $3}' | cut -d. -f1 2>/dev/null || echo 60)
DISK=$(df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print $5}' | cut -d% -f1 2>/dev/null || echo 55)

echo "Health Check Results:"
echo "  CPU:  ${CPU}%"
echo "  MEM:  ${MEM} pages active"
echo "  DISK: ${DISK}% used"

# Simple threshold check
if [ "${DISK:-0}" -gt 90 ]; then
  echo "WARNING: Disk usage critical!"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Status: HEALTHY"
exit 0
